text:
On Friday, the 2024 Summer Olympics in Paris opened with ablasphemous mockeryof Leonardo Da Vinci’sThe Last Supper, which featured drag queens and gay icons.

On today’s episode ofThe Spectator P.M. Podcast, cohosts Ellie Gardey Holmes and Aubrey Gulick discuss the all-out war being waged against Christianity. They talk about the reactions of Christians and the “artists” involved, and discuss the non-apology the Olympic organizers issued on Sunday.(READ Lou Aguilar’s analysishere)

Join them to hear their analysis!



Like and shareTheSpectator P.M. Podcast, and tune in to our next episode!

Read Aubrey and Ellie’s writinghereandhere.

Listen to theSpectator P.M.Podcastwith Aubrey Gulick and Ellie Gardey onSpotify.

Watch theSpectator P.M. Podcastwith Aubrey Gulick and Ellie Gardey onRumble.
